description: Detects time-of-check-time-of-use races in Rust: path existence checks create TOCTOU windows. Simplified from Rust: flags all .exists()/.is_file()/.is_dir() method calls regardless of whether a file operation follows in the same if-body. Precision reduced -- checks without subsequent file operations also flagged.

flag.message: Path existence check (.exists()/.is_file()/.is_dir()) may create TOCTOU race window if followed by file operations
